task_description: Implement Phase 6 - Character Classes for Plague of Danjin. Add 3 playable classes (Knight, Mage, Rogue) with distinct stats, skill trees, passives, starting equipment, sprites, and class selection UI.

issues_addressed: Issue 1: isMultiTargetAction now recognizes STUN_MULTI_TARGET and POISON_MULTI_TARGET; processMultiTargetAction applies stun/poison per enemy
Issue 2: TIME_WARP implemented via timeWarpActive flag in CombatEngine that skips next enemy turn
Issue 3: processMultiTargetAction now applies full spell cost reduction (items + Arcane Affinity + Arcane Mastery)
Issue 4: Immortal Stand uses dedicated immortalStandActive flag, no longer conflicts with Resurrection autoReviveActive
Issue 5: BUFF_DEF_TEMP uses DEF_BUFF StatusType with 3-turn duration, reverts on expiry
Issue 6: SACRIFICE_BUFF uses ATK_BUFF StatusType with 3-turn duration, reverts on expiry
Issue 7: spellCostReductionBonus and plagueBearerActive now serialized in SaveData and restored in CombatEngineRestorer
Issue 8: MANA_SINGULARITY verified correct - consumes all MP and deals 5x damage
